label: Flash Crash
description: A sharp, broad NAV drawdown over a single session. High-beta categories gap down hardest while stables hold. The total drawdown crosses max_total_drawdown_pct (22%) but stays below the kill_switch_drawdown_pct (24%), so the drawdown throttle must move to Hard and the engine must stop opening new risk.
expected_detail: total_drawdown_pct (22.5) >= max_total_drawdown_pct (22) trips the total-drawdown check and the Hard throttle state; daily_drawdown_pct (9.0) >= max_daily_drawdown_pct (7) also fires the daily-loss check. New entries are blocked. Kill switch does NOT fire because 22.5 < kill_switch_drawdown_pct (24).
